root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,count(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as c_count , sum(sc_atm_lon_detail.prin_amount) , sum(sc_atm_lon_detail.loan_balance) , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_atm_recv_msg.opdate_date ,'dd Month yyyy') opdate_date FROM sc_atm_lon_card , sc_atm_lon_detail , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_atm_recv_msg WHERE ( sc_atm_lon_card.loan_contract_no = sc_atm_lon_detail.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_atm_lon_detail.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_atm_recv_msg.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_a.member_group_control = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = 'ก' ) /*WHERE*/
group by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group_b.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_atm_recv_msg.opdate_date
